description: Upload manifest for 2600/ document indexing. Tracks which files have been synced to production.

schema.version: string — manifest version for schema compatibility
schema.last_sync: ISO 8601 timestamp of last successful bulk upload

workflow: 1. New docs added to 2600/ and indexed into ChromaDB locally
2. When ready for bulk sync: cp -r new-docs 2600/2600-staging/
4. Script updates this manifest with uploaded_at, md5, status=uploaded
5. Move synced files back to 2600/ or delete from staging
6. Commit updated manifest to Git for audit trail
_comments.git_audit: This manifest is committed to Git so you can see upload history via git log
_comments.recovery: To retry failed uploads: grep '"failed"' .upload-manifest.json and re-process
